tool_calls: tr ' ' '\n' < /data/poem.txt | grep -v '^$' | sort | uniq -c | sort -rn | head -3 | awk '{print $2, $1}'

tool_outputs.stdout:
the cat sat on the mat
the cat in the hat
the dog on the log
the frog on the bog
